contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Oracle credential-link fix + deploy-alias fix + advisory panel declutter
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/26
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/96
  
  Details:
  Three follow-ups on the oracle/Sophia stack. (1) Fixed the broken oracle-to-credential loop on oracle.truesight.me: the My Credentials link on index.html sat inside a permanently hidden credentialsSection wrapper the JS never unhid, so the link to the practitioner's generated credential at truesight.me/programs/truesight-grounding/credentials/#pk-slug could never appear; new revealCredentialsSection helper plus init-time surfacing makes the credential link visible as soon as the keypair exists (not gated behind today's submission), with state-aware status copy; verified the target side resolves pk- fragments via live program-shell.js (CV cache, 6h rebuild, graceful placeholder). (2) Collapsed the four advisory debug links (ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT raw, index.json, snapshots archive, GAS backend) into an Under-the-hood details element per Gary's are-these-still-needed question — preserved for operators, hidden during normal readings; Copy-context-for-other-LLM-oracles stays prominent. (3) Fixed truesight_autopilot deploy.sh default EC2_HOST from the dead truesight-autopilot ssh alias to the live sophia alias (yesterday's deploy failure root cause) plus README ssh instructions. PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/26 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/96
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
